channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Malinowski concedes to Mejia in Democratic House special primary in New Jersey
item.description: With the race still too close to call, former congressman Tom Malinowski conceded to challenger Analilia Mejia in a Democratic primary to replace the ...

item.title: Pakistan-Afghanistan border closures paralyze trade along a key route
item.description: Trucks have been stuck at the closed border since October. Both countries are facing economic losses with no end in sight. The Taliban also banned all...

item.title: A historic day for U.S. cross-country skiing, but Shiffin's Olympic struggles continue
item.description: American women continue to dominate alpine ski racing events in the Winter Olympics, and American men win their first medal in cross-country skiing in...

item.title: Snowboarder Chloe Kim is chasing an Olympic gold three-peat with a torn labrum
item.description: At 25, Chloe Kim could become the first halfpipe snowboarder to win three consecutive Olympic golds.

item.title: DHS Shutdown Looms as Senate Democrats Reject White House ICE Deal
item.description: Republicans have so far spurned most of Democrats’ demands to rein in federal agents carrying out President Trump’s immigration crackdown, threatening...

item.title: Georgia Ballot Inquiry Originated With Election Denier in Trump White House
item.description: A newly unsealed affidavit showed that a criminal investigation into the 2020 election in Fulton County, Ga., relied heavily on claims about ballots t...

item.title: Jimmy Lai and the Future of Freedom
item.description: The West has abandoned dissidents as a public cause.

item.title: YouTube Argues It Isn’t Social Media in Landmark Tech Addiction Trial
item.description: The app said in opening statements that it was more of an entertainment platform. The lawsuit claims social media companies design products that cause...

item.title: Top 5 takeaways from the House immigration oversight hearing
item.description: The hearing underscored how deeply divided Republicans and Democrats remain on top-level changes to immigration enforcement in the wake of the shootin...

item.title: Bulgaria Is at the Heart of Europe’s Harsh New Approach to Immigration
item.description: This former military barracks in Bulgaria has become a symbol of the E.U.’s increasingly strict policing of its borders — and of what may come next.

item.title: A Desperate Father, a Troubled Son and Death in a 5-Star Hotel
item.description: Henry McGowan headed for Europe, showing signs of mental distress. His father, John McGowan, raced after him. This week, the son will stand trial in I...

item.title: A Crucial Step in Trump’s Gaza Plan
item.description: Persuading Hamas to give up its weapons is the “linchpin of everything” in the president’s plan.

item.title: Israelis Protest Surge in Gun Crime Within Arab Community
item.description: Palestinian and Jewish citizens of Israel joined forces to demand government action in the face of a spiraling death toll from criminal violence among...

item.title: What to Know About Canada’s New Bridge to the U.S. That Trump Hates
item.description: President Trump’s threat to block the opening of the new crossing is the latest in a long string of challenges for the project.

item.title: Russia Further Restricts Telegram, Escalating Internet Clampdown
item.description: The throttling of the communication app, used by more than 100 million Russians, endangers what remains of the country’s free internet.
